query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT playerId) as online_players FROM online_sessions WHERE status = 'active' AND lastHeartbeat > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT playerId) as online_players FROM online_sessions WHERE status = 'active' AND lastHeartbeat > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE);
